task: Create a truthful consolidation bridge for aiarchitectacademy.com.
audience: Visitors arriving through the legacy AI Architect Academy address
first_read: The learning path continues at the canonical Starlight Intelligence Academy.

references.label: Starlight brand world
references.reason: Defines the precise, quiet, high-trust material and copy posture.

references.label: Provider audit canonical decision
references.reason: Confirms the canonical target is the Academy root because /architect is 404.

direction.signature: A single canonical handoff presented as a quiet system-state transition.

asset_quality.why_premium: The exact, accessible transition UI is the correct evidence for a legacy redirect surface.

artifacts.notes: Corrected Git preview inspected at 1440, 390, 320, 640, and 641 pixels plus reduced motion; authenticated verification was required because deployment protection intercepts public requests.

checks.name: asset-tier
checks.evidence: Tier C exact interface selected; no decorative asset is needed.

checks.name: export-inspection
checks.evidence: Desktop and mobile captures inspected; 390px viewport has zero horizontal overflow.

checks.name: visual-qa
checks.evidence: 1440px/390px composition pass; 640px reflow has scrollWidth=clientWidth; first Tab focuses /continue with a solid outline; reduced motion resolves to static auto behavior.

score.notes: 5 first read, 4 brand distinctiveness, 4 craft, 5 accessibility/responsiveness, 5 factual/provenance, 5 intended usefulness.

known_risks: The protected pre-mapping production deployment remains the rollback reference until the native main deployment is verified.
Deployment protection intercepts unauthenticated public preview requests.
Domain attachment, TLS, DNS, and IONOS changes remain outside this release boundary.
